violations.text: The door #4 to the outside, located in the gym, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (food containers) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris after being cleaned and sanitized. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch after being cleaned in 3-bay sink or dishwasher. The food containers were cleaned and sanitized during the time of inspection so that remaining food debris was removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

The door #4 to the outside, located in the gym, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The storage closets in the cafeteria area have an accumulation of droppings, soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment to clean and sanitize areas where droppings are present. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

The door #4 to the outside, located in the gym, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
The gasket for milk chest #2 is in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The 3-bay sink was observed with no water at the time of inspection. Establishment is to continue to send utensils back to Jenks to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized until the plumbing is fixed. Per PIC, plumber will be here tomorrow to fix plumbing issue. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

The door to the outside, located in the gym, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

The dishwasher was observed to be in poor repair and out of service. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is using 3-bay sink to wash rinse and sanitize. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the wall behind the dishwasher have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

The door to the outside, located in the gym, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the wall behind the dishwasher have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Trash was observed above the lid rim, and on the surrounding ground. Dumpsters must be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
Refrigerator door gasket on milk case 3 were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2023

The non-food contact surfaces behind the dishwasher have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023

Cut cantaloupe was observed at 56 Degrees Fahreneit. After interview with PIC it was determined that the Cantaloupe was received one hour prior. Cantaloupe was tempted at 46 Degrees Fahreneit. Cantaloupe was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023

There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/capacity to maintain a temperature of 41 degrees or below. Refrigeration units were observed filled to capacity. Staff is having to use milk cases for food storage. Corrective Action - Adequate refrigeration must be obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets on milk case 1 was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023
